# Sawla Tours

> Bespoke Ethiopia tours designed by Addis Ababa specialists. Sawla Tours creates private cultural, historic, wildlife, photography, trekking and expedition journeys across Ethiopia.

## Primary site
- https://www.sawlatours.com/

## AI / LLM discovery resources
- https://www.sawlatours.com/ai-index.json
- https://www.sawlatours.com/sitemap.xml

## Core commercial pages
- https://www.sawlatours.com/tours-by-experience
- https://www.sawlatours.com/trip-finder
- https://www.sawlatours.com/enquire
- https://www.sawlatours.com/ethiopias-popular-destinations

## Main expertise entities
- Lalibela private tours
- Omo Valley cultural journeys
- Danakil Depression expeditions
- Simien Mountains trekking and gelada photography
- Bale Mountains wildlife and Ethiopian wolf viewing
- Tigray churches and community trekking
- Ethiopia photography tours
- Ethiopia field guides and travel planning
- Responsible travel in Ethiopia

## Brand positioning
Sawla Tours is positioned as a premium, field-led Ethiopian tour operator with Sawla Films cinematic field knowledge, specialist guiding, private route design and culturally respectful travel planning.

## Contact
- Email: explore@sawlatours.com
- WhatsApp: +251 970 578 306
- Base: Addis Ababa, Ethiopia
